zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Parles Hervey於1368年出生在英國英格蘭貝德福爾瑟利時，她的父親Ralph Parles MP33歲，母親Katherine de Talbot28歲。她於1396年與John Hervey III在英國英格蘭貝德福爾瑟利結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1427年4月26日在英國英格蘭貝德福爾艾爾斯托福享年59歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Parles Hervey于1368年出生在英国英格兰貝德福爾瑟利时，她的父亲Ralph Parles MP33岁，母亲Katherine de Talbot28岁。她于1396年与John Hervey III在英国英格兰貝德福爾瑟利结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1427年4月26日在英国英格兰貝德福爾艾爾斯托福享年59岁。

nameMeanings.name: Parles
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: In some cases possibly also southern French: from the ancient Germanic personal name Sarilo (see Sarlo ).

variants.name: Searles
meanings: English: variant of Searle , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Parles Hervey was born in 1368, in Thurleigh, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Ralph Parles MP, was 33 and her mother, Katherine de Talbot, was 28. She married John Hervey III in 1396, in Thurleigh, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 26 April 1427, in Elstow, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 59.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Parles Hervey est née en 1368, à Thurleigh, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Ralph Parles MP, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Katherine de Talbot, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé John Hervey III en 1396, à Thurleigh, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 26 avril 1427, à Elstow, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 59 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Parles Hervey(이)가 1368년 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르 스를리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ralph Parles MP(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Katherine de Talbot(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 1396년 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르 스를리에서 John Hervey III(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1427년 4월 26일 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르 엘스타우에서 59세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Parles Hervey родилась в 1368 г. в местности турлиг, бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Ralph Parles MP было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Katherine de Talbot, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Hervey III в 1396 г. в местности турлиг, бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла 26 апреля 1427 г. в местности элстоу, бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 59 лет.
